article_title: Vertical Slice Architecture 生产落地指南：.NET 项目结构的最佳布局
core_theme: Vertical Slice Architecture 按 feature 而非技术层组织 .NET 项目，每个切片自包含 Endpoint、Handler、Mapping、Validators 四个文件，通过 marker 接口自动注册
reader_takeaway: 获得一个可直接复用的 VSA 项目布局模板，理解切片内部结构、模块间通信和自动注册机制
summary_angle: 把「传统分层混乱 → 按 feature 切片 → 自动注册」做成一张结构化叙事封面

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文开头：传统分层项目改一个 feature 要跨三四个文件夹跳来跳去
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧凌乱的文件夹结构，Controllers、Services、Repositories 分散在不同位置

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 VSA 结构：每个 feature 一个文件夹，4 个文件（Endpoint、Handler、Mapping、Validators）
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中央整齐的切片结构，每个切片是一个自包含模块

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Automatic Registration 章节：marker 接口 + assembly scanning 自动注册
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧所有切片通过 marker 接口自动汇聚注册到应用

main_metaphor: 一个校园风格的建筑群——传统分层的混乱教学楼被重组为按学科（feature）自包含的学院楼，每栋楼内部职能齐全
primary_subject: 一组按功能排列的模块化建筑/代码模块，每栋楼内部结构清晰可见
subject_action: 从左侧分散的碎片建筑重组为右侧整齐的模块化建筑群，通过统一的路径/接口连接
composition: 居中主结构，从左到右的重组叙事推进
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: youthful campus romance illustration, clean school-life setting, soft backlight, subtle emotional gestures, fresh color palette
selected_style_reason: 随机选中（索引 5）；架构组织类内容用清新的校园场景来比喻「按 feature 重新组织项目结构」，降低架构话题的距离感
style_safety_note: 使用泛校园风格描述，不涉及特定作品或作者
draft_goal: 第一轮验证：校园隐喻是否成立、三个信息块是否可读、isometric 构图是否清晰
revision_targets: 如果校园感过强冲淡架构主题，加强模块化结构感
如果信息块看不清，放大标注
如果等距透视变形，简化构图
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: Vertical Slice Architecture in .NET - organizing projects by feature instead of technical layers, with each slice being a self-contained folder containing Endpoint, Handler, Mapping, and Validators. The reader should feel they can adopt this production layout immediately.

Summary angle: The journey from 'scattered cross-layer folders' to 'self-contained feature slices' to 'auto-registration via marker interfaces' compressed into a readable cover.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-3 supporting beats.
Information blocks:
- Problem: scattered messy folder structures on the left (Controllers, Services, Repositories spread apart), labeled with short Chinese text
- Mechanism: clean organized feature slices in the center, each a self-contained module, labeled with short Chinese text
- Step: all slices connecting to auto-registration hub on the right, labeled with short Chinese text

Main metaphor: A campus-style architectural complex - chaotic old buildings reorganized into self-contained department buildings, each with complete internal functions.
Subject: A set of modular buildings/code modules arranged by feature, with clear internal structure visible.
Composition/framing: Centered main structure with left-to-right reorganization narrative. Keep one dominant focal point.
Style/medium: combine isometric conceptual systems scene with the selected visual style descriptor: youthful campus romance illustration, clean school-life setting, soft backlight, subtle emotional gestures, fresh color palette. Stylized, polished, editorial. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: soft blue, sakura pink, cream white, fresh green.
Visible text policy: allow only 3 short Chinese labels, each at most 6 Chinese characters. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics.
Avoid: neon cityscapes, cyberpunk purple-blue glow, floating chips, code rain, HUD overlays, generic robots, dashboards, fake terminals, fake charts.
